name: Chocolate Raspberry Cheesecake 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the 6 oz of semisweet chocolate chips in a bowl, melt and cool slightly.
2. Mix the melted chocolate with whipped cream until smooth.
3. Combine crumbs and butter; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch spring-form pan.
4. In another bowl, combine 24 oz cream cheese and sugar, mixing on medium speed until well blended. Blend in sour cream and vanilla. Pour over the crust.
5. In a separate bowl, mix the remaining 8 oz cream cheese with melted chocolate until well combined. Add the raspberry preserves and mix well.
6. Drop rounded measuring tablespoons of the mixture over the plain cheese layer; do not swirl.
7. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour and 25 minutes. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan, then cool before removing from the pan.
8. Spread the melted chocolate and whipped cream mixture over the cheesecake. Chill and garnish with additional whipped cream and raspberries.
